text.title: Daily Ads Anomaly Checklist Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for one daily-run log. Validator enforces threshold + actual values + action enum + named owner.

example.note: Owner is "team" (banned); checks is empty (must have all 6); no threshold/actual values.

list.item: Less than 6 checks (must cover all anomaly categories).
action="pause" without auto_resume_at OR daily-cost-hard-cap notation (rule reversible-pause-default).
